conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Thinking about relocating -- top options right now are Austin, Denver, and Raleigh.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Got a reminder that my credit card statement is due soon.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Austin's job market for my field is strong but the traffic reportedly got a lot worse in the last few years.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I need to call the insurance company about a claim this week.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Denver has the mountains close by, which is appealing, but the cost of living has climbed a lot recently.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: The package I ordered got delayed by a couple of days.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I need to get my bike tuned up before the weather turns.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My phone's storage is almost full again, need to clear out old photos.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Raleigh's cost of living is noticeably lower than the other two, and the flights back home to see family are shorter.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Got the bike tuned up, the shop said the brakes were basically worn out.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I've been meaning to reorganize the garage for weeks now.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Looked at direct flight options from each city back to where my parents live, Raleigh wins by a wide margin.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My cousin's baby shower is coming up, need to pick a gift.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Still a little drawn to Denver for the outdoor access honestly.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My favorite coffee shop downtown is closing at the end of the month.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Cost of living calculator put Raleigh well below both Austin and Denver for a comparable apartment.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Decided on Raleigh. The shorter flights back home to see family and the lower cost of living made it the clear choice over Austin and Denver.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Going to start looking at neighborhoods there this weekend.

query: Which city did the user decide to move to?

answer_contains: shorter flights back home to see family
